questions.question: In your own life, what makes child care a good kind of paid work for you to think about?
sounds_right: mujhe bachche pasand hai, ghar se hi kar sakti hoon, bahar kaam pe nahi jana padega
mere do chhote bachche hain, unke saath rahkar aur 2–3 bachchon ko sambhal lungi toh thoda paisa aa jayega
gaon ki auratein kheti pe jati hain, unko jagah chahiye bachcha rakhne ki, main ye kaam kar sakti hoon
sounds_confused: mujhe bachche bilkul pasand nahi, bas paise mil jaye toh theek hai
ye toh sirf timepass hai, isme paisa kahan banta hai

questions.question: If one neighbour says, ‘yeh toh bas bachche bithana hai, isme kya kaam hai’, how would you answer her now?
sounds_right: nahi, isme bhi kaam hai, bachche ko khana, safai, khelna, sab dekhna padta hai
abhi parents chahte hain ki bachcha seekhe bhi, sirf baithna nahi, isliye dhyaan dena padta hai
ye proper kaam hai didi, zimmedaari bhi hai aur paisa bhi mil sakta hai
sounds_confused: haan bas bithana hi toh hai, kuchh special nahi
main kuchh nahi bolungi, waise hi hai shayad

questions.question: If you start a small home daycare, how many children do you feel you can handle safely in your space right now?
sounds_right: abhi toh mera kamra chhota hai, 2–3 bachche theek rahenge
do room hai, verandah bhi hai, shuru mein 4 bachche le lungi bus
pehle 2 bachchon se shuru karungi, baad mein dheere dheere badhaungi
sounds_confused: jitne bhi aa jaye, 10–12 bhi aa gaye toh rakh lungi
number ka kya hai, bas paisa dena chahiye

questions.question: Which age group of children do you feel easiest for you to start with at home, and why?
sounds_right: mujhe 2 se 5 saal wale theek lagte hain, thoda chal phir sakte hain, khud kha bhi lete hain
bilkul naya born nahi, thoda bade, jaise 1.5 saal ke, unko sambhalna asaan rahega
school se chhote bachche, anganwadi waale umar ke, unke saath main khel ke sikha sakti hoon
sounds_confused: sab ek saath, newborn se lekar 10 saal tak sabko rakh lungi
mujhe pata nahi, bas jo bhi mil jaye

questions.question: When we say ‘modern child care’, what 2–3 things should happen with the child besides only feeding and sleeping?
sounds_right: bachche ka khel khel mein padhai bhi ho, jaise rhyme, counting
usko pyar se rakhe, uske emotions samjhe, sirf daant na ho
dusre bachchon ke saath milna, share karna bhi sikhe
sounds_confused: bas pet bhara ho, kapda ho, bus ho gaya care
modern matlab sirf mobile dikhao, TV lagao

questions.question: Imagine a 3‑year‑old in your daycare. What is one simple play game you can do that also helps learning?
sounds_right: rang ke hisaab se dana alag karwana, bolna ye laal hai, ye peela hai
gaon ke pathar se ginti karna, 1,2,3 bolna
taali bajake poem sunaana, bachcha bhi repeat kare
sounds_confused: usko bas poora din mobile de dungi chup rahega
sirf kursi pe bithake rakho, khelne ki zaroorat nahi

questions.question: Looking at your house in your mind, what is one thing you would change to make it safer for small children?
sounds_right: chaku, matchbox upar rakhungi, bachchon ki pahunch se door
balti mein pani khula nahi rakhoongi, girne ka darr hota hai
rasoi ka darwaza band rakhoongi, bachche wahan na jaye
sounds_confused: kuchh badalne ki zaroorat nahi, bachche khud dekh lenge
main sab samaan zameen pe hi rehne dungi, farq nahi padta

questions.question: What simple toys or activities can you arrange at home so that children feel it is a fun place, even without buying expensive things?
sounds_right: gendi, purane dabbe, kagaz se ball bana sakti hoon
kahani sunana, geet gaana, mitti ke khilone se khelna
daane, lakdi se khel khel sakte hain
sounds_confused: kuchh nahi, bas TV chala ke baitha dungi
jab tak mehnga khilona nahi aayega, tab tak kuchh nahi hoga

questions.question: If a very small baby in your house sleeps a lot in the first days, what should you still remember to do again and again?
sounds_right: do ghante mein doodh pilana, chahe so raha ho
maa ka doodh hi baar baar dena hai, pani nahi
usey poora din sone nahi dena, beech beech mein uthake feed dena
sounds_confused: so raha hai toh rehne do, din bhar bina dudh ke bhi chalega
bhookha lage toh ro lega, tabhi dungi, baaki main nahi dekhungi

questions.question: If a newborn baby looks very yellow and is not drinking milk well, what is the safe step for the family to take?
sounds_right: turant doctor ko dikhana chahiye, piliya ho sakta hai
hospital le jana hai, ghar pe rukna nahi
ASHA ya nurse ko bula ke poochna chahiye
sounds_confused: ye toh normal hai, kuchh karne ki zaroorat nahi
bas dhoop mein lita do, doctor ki kya zaroorat

questions.question: Think about women nearby who go for work. Who could be your first 1–2 paying parents if you start home daycare?
sounds_right: meri padosan jo kheti pe jati hai, uska beta rakh sakti hoon
neeche waali bhabhi jo gharon mein jhaadu pocha karti hai
meri didi ki saheli jo factory me kaam karti hai
sounds_confused: pata nahi, pehle sabko free mein rakhungi, baad mein sochenge
sirf door sheher waale log, gaon waale nahi denge

questions.question: When you talk about fees with a parent, what is one clear thing you should always tell them?
sounds_right: kitne baje se kitne baje tak bachcha rahega, usi ke hisaab se fees bataungi
mahine ki fees kitni hai aur kab deni hai, pehle hi bolungi
main kya karungi, jaise khana, khel, padhai, aur kya nahi karungi, woh bataungi
sounds_confused: main pehle kuch nahi bataungi, baad mein jitna mann kare utna le lungi
fees ki baat hi nahi karni, sharm aati hai
